name: memlin
description: Shared project context, decisions, and experience for Codex and every coding agent.

interface.shortDescription: Shared project context and decisions across coding agents.
interface.longDescription: Memlin gives Codex the decisions, project context, and prior results it needs to work consistently across sessions and agents. It adds MCP tools, a guided skill, and lifecycle hooks for resolving and capturing context.
defaultPrompt: Find the most relevant project context for this task.
Save this decision so every coding agent can reuse it.
Show recent project decisions and their outcomes.
